ana.sourceNote: Biotic Rifle is hitscan scoped, projectile unscoped. Origin per official hero page.

anran.sourceNote: 2026 rebrand hero. Origin from OverFast location (Chengdu); gender and attack type are best-effort pending wiki confirmation.

ashe.sourceNote: BlizzCon 2018 hero. The Viper is hitscan both modes.

baptiste.sourceNote: March 2019 hero. Biotic Launcher damage burst is hitscan.

bastion.sourceNote: Launch hero; it/its pronouns. SST Laboratories unit, Gothenburg association per OverFast.

brigitte.sourceNote: March 2018 hero. Rocket Flail is melee.

cassidy.sourceNote: Launch hero, renamed 2021; former handle kept as a search alias.

domina.sourceNote: 2026 rebrand hero. Origin from OverFast location (London, formerly); gender and attack type are best-effort pending wiki confirmation.

doomfist.sourceNote: July 2017 hero. Hand Cannon is hitscan; the kit is built on melee punches.

dva.sourceNote: Launch-year hero (2016). Fusion Cannons are hitscan spread.

echo.sourceNote: April 2020 hero; she/her omnic built in the United States per OverFast location. Tri-Shot projectile plus Focusing Beam.

emre.sourceNote: 2026 rebrand hero. Origin from OverFast location (Istanbul, previous); gender and attack type are best-effort pending wiki confirmation.

freja.sourceNote: 2025 Season 16 hero. Revdraw Crossbow is projectile; Danish bounty hunter per official reveal.

genji.sourceNote: Launch hero. Shuriken projectiles plus Dragonblade melee.

hanzo.sourceNote: Launch hero. Storm Bow arrows are projectile.

hazard.sourceNote: December 2024 tank. Bonespur is projectile; the kit leans on melee spikes. Glasgow origin per OverFast.

illari.sourceNote: August 2023 hero. Solar Rifle damage fire is hitscan.

jetpack-cat.sourceNote: 2026 rebrand hero. Watchpoint: Gibraltar resident per OverFast; gender, origin, and attack type are best-effort pending wiki confirmation.

junker-queen.sourceNote: OW2 launch tank (October 2022). Scattergun hitscan plus knife and axe melee.

junkrat.sourceNote: Launch hero. Frag Launcher is projectile.

juno.sourceNote: August 2024 hero, born on the Red Promise Colony, Mars. Mediblaster is hitscan.

kiriko.sourceNote: OW2 launch support (October 2022). Kunai are projectile.

lifeweaver.sourceNote: April 2023 hero. Thorn Volley is projectile; Thai origin per official hero page.

lucio.sourceNote: Launch hero. Sonic Amplifier is projectile.

mauga.sourceNote: December 2023 tank. Twin chainguns are hitscan.

mei.sourceNote: Launch hero. Endothermic Blaster stream plus icicle projectile.

mercy.sourceNote: Launch hero. Caduceus Staff beams plus blaster projectiles.

mizuki.sourceNote: 2026 rebrand hero. Origin from OverFast location (Tokyo, previous); gender and attack type are best-effort pending wiki confirmation.

moira.sourceNote: November 2017 hero, Dublin-born; the OverFast location (Oasis) is her residence. Biotic Grasp is beam.

orisa.sourceNote: March 2017 hero; she/her omnic built in Numbani. Augmented Fusion Driver is projectile.

pharah.sourceNote: Launch hero, Egyptian-Canadian (Canadian father per lore), hence the extra region tag. Rocket Launcher is projectile.

ramattra.sourceNote: December 2022 tank; he/him omnic of the Shambali. Void Accelerator projectile plus Nemesis pummel.

reaper.sourceNote: Launch hero, Los Angeles-born; the OverFast location (Rome) is the Talon base. Hellfire Shotguns are hitscan.

reinhardt.sourceNote: Launch hero. Rocket Hammer is melee.

roadhog.sourceNote: Launch hero. Scrap Gun shrapnel is projectile.

sierra.sourceNote: 2026 Season 2 hero. Origin from OverFast location (Grand Mesa, Colorado); gender and attack type are best-effort pending wiki confirmation.

sojourn.sourceNote: OW2 launch damage hero (October 2022). Railgun primary is projectile, charged secondary is hitscan.

soldier-76.sourceNote: Launch hero, Indiana-born per lore. Heavy Pulse Rifle is hitscan.

sombra.sourceNote: November 2016 hero. Machine Pistol is hitscan.

symmetra.sourceNote: Launch hero. Photon Projector beam plus orb projectile.

torbjorn.sourceNote: Launch hero. Rivet Gun primary is projectile, shotgun secondary is hitscan.

tracer.sourceNote: Launch hero. Pulse Pistols are hitscan.

vendetta.sourceNote: 2025 hero. OverFast lists Rome, which is also the Talon base, so the origin needs wiki confirmation along with gender, attack type, and exact release.

venture.sourceNote: April 2024 hero; they/them per official announcement. Smart Excavator is projectile.

widowmaker.sourceNote: Launch hero. Widow's Kiss is hitscan in both configurations.

winston.sourceNote: Launch hero, Horizon-raised scientist. Tesla Cannon is beam.

wrecking-ball.sourceNote: July 2018 tank; Horizon escapee who landed in the Outback, hence both tags. Quad Cannons are hitscan.

wuyang.sourceNote: 2025 Season 18 support from Wuxing University, Chengdu. Water-bolt primary is projectile.

zarya.sourceNote: Launch hero; Siberian, hence both region tags. Particle Cannon beam plus energy grenade.

zenyatta.sourceNote: Launch hero; he/him omnic of the Shambali. Orbs of Destruction are projectile.

shion.name: Shion
shion.sourceNote: Hero 52, announced for June 16, 2026 (Reign of Talon Season 3): Flanker Damage omnic of the Hashimoto Clan per coverage. Not on OverFast until launch; HP and attack type are placeholders.
